products.name: AeroPress Go Coffee Maker
products.description: Portable coffee press that brews smooth, rich coffee in about a minute. Includes a travel mug that doubles as a carrying case.

products.name: Sage Barista Express Espresso Machine
products.description: Bean-to-cup espresso machine with a built-in conical burr grinder, manual steam wand and precise espresso extraction.

products.name: Anker PowerCore 20000 Power Bank
products.description: High-capacity 20,000 mAh power bank with fast USB-C charging, enough to charge a phone roughly four times.

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 30-hour battery life and multipoint Bluetooth connection.

products.name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
products.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with a quiet click, 8K DPI sensor and an electromagnetic scroll wheel. Connects to up to three devices.

products.name: Kindle Paperwhite (16 GB)
products.description: Waterproof e-reader with a 6.8-inch glare-free display, adjustable warm light and weeks of battery life.

products.name: Fellow Stagg EKG Electric Kettle
products.description: Precision gooseneck electric kettle with variable temperature control and a 60-minute hold mode, ideal for pour-over coffee.

products.name: Theragun Mini Massage Gun
products.description: Compact percussive therapy device with three speed settings and 150 minutes of battery life. Fits in a gym bag.

products.name: Garmin Forerunner 265 Watch
products.description: GPS running smartwatch with an AMOLED display, training readiness score and up to 13 days of battery life.

products.name: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat
products.description: Dense 6 mm professional yoga mat with a lifetime guarantee, known for its durability and joint support.

products.name: Philips Hue Starter Kit (3 bulbs)
products.description: Smart lighting starter kit with three colour-changing bulbs and a bridge. Works with voice assistants and schedules.

products.name: Dyson V12 Detect Slim Vacuum
products.description: Lightweight cordless vacuum with a laser that reveals microscopic dust and up to 60 minutes of runtime.

products.name: Moleskine Classic Notebook (Large)
products.description: Iconic hardcover ruled notebook with an elastic closure, ribbon bookmark and expandable inner pocket.

products.name: Herman Miller Sayl Office Chair
products.description: Ergonomic office chair with a distinctive suspension back, adjustable seat depth and fully adjustable arms.

products.name: BenQ ScreenBar Halo Monitor Light
products.description: Monitor-mounted light bar with a wireless controller, auto-dimming and an asymmetric optical design that avoids screen glare.

products.name: JBL Flip 6 Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker with punchy bass and 12 hours of playtime. Pairs with a second speaker for stereo sound.

products.name: Ninja Dual Zone Air Fryer
products.description: Air fryer with two independent cooking zones, letting you cook two different foods at once and finish them at the same time.

products.name: Hydro Flask Wide Mouth Bottle (946 ml)
products.description: Insulated stainless steel water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. Dishwasher safe.

products.name: TP-Link Tapo Smart Plug (4-pack)
products.description: Wi-Fi smart plugs with energy monitoring, schedules and voice assistant support. No hub required.

products.name: Ember Mug 2 Temperature Control Mug
products.description: App-controlled smart mug that keeps your coffee or tea at your exact preferred temperature for up to 80 minutes.
